PROMPT: Cinematic YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm f/1.4 lens, shallow depth of field, [CENA]. The composition is carefully structured with the [CHARACTER] filling the entire frame as a medium close-up from the waist up, the figure centered horizontally with the nose and eyes aligned with the vertical center axis of the image, the head positioned in the upper 25-30% of the frame. A strong heavy black vignette applied as a visual layer BENEATH the text but ABOVE the image — the vignette darkening all four edges and corners of the frame significantly (the corners almost fully black, the side edges heavily darkened fading gradually toward the center), the vignette creating a natural spotlight/tunnel-vision effect that draws the viewer's eye forcefully toward the bright center of the image where the face and text converge, the lateral vignette on the LEFT and RIGHT sides especially pronounced (the side edges darkened to near-black within the outer 15-20% of frame width on each side, creating a subtle widescreen-letterbox-like effect on the sides that compresses the viewer's attention into the central 60-70% of the frame), the vignette smooth and organic with a natural gradient falloff from dark edges to bright center — NOT a hard-edged frame or border, the vignette effect making the central zone (face + text) appear brighter and more vibrant by contrast with the darkened periphery. The text overlays directly ON TOP of the character and scene and ON TOP of the vignette layer — there are NO black bars, NO dark rectangles, NO solid background panels, NO banners behind the text whatsoever. The text sits transparently over the image relying ONLY on its thick outline/stroke and drop shadow for readability. The main text block (white line + red line together) is positioned at the DEAD CENTER of the 1280x720 frame — the vertical midpoint of the combined text block aligns with the exact vertical midpoint of the image (360px from top). This means the text WILL overlap and cover parts of the character's chest, shoulders and armor — this is intentional and correct, the character serves as the backdrop BEHIND the text, not separate from it. Dramatic cinematic lighting with warm golden-hour backlight creating strong rim-light glow around the hair and wing edges, moody stormy atmosphere in the background, deep shadows creating high contrast chiaroscuro, hyper-photorealistic with realistic skin texture (visible pores, natural imperfections), NOT illustration, NOT painting, NOT 3D render — strictly photorealistic cinematic photography, 8K resolution, sharp tack focus on the eyes, rich cinematic color grading with warm autumn amber-orange and burnt crimson tones blended with deep moody charcoal shadows, swirling autumn leaves (deep red, burnt orange, amber gold and brown) caught in dramatic wind frozen in mid-air throughout the frame in three depth layers (foreground leaves slightly blurred, mid-ground leaves sharp, background leaves softly blurred), atmospheric haze and floating dust particles backlit by warm golden light. Bold overlay text in three blocks with NO background panels or bars — text floats transparently over the vignette and image: TOP LINE "[TEXTO DE CIMA]" in massive oversized bold white sans-serif font (Impact or Anton), all caps, filling 80% of frame width, horizontally centered at the vertical center of the image, pure bright white (#FFFFFF) with extra thick heavy black outline/stroke (minimum 5px) and strong deep black drop shadow — NO solid banner behind, NO black rectangle, ONLY outline and shadow for contrast; MIDDLE LINE "[TEXTO DE BAIXO]" in same massive oversized bold font, all caps, filling 80% of frame width, horizontally centered, positioned directly below the white text with minimal gap, vivid blazing bright almost-neon scarlet red (hex #FF1A1A, NOT dark crimson, NOT maroon — electric luminous red that glows like backlit neon), extra thick heavy black outline/stroke (minimum 5px) and strong deep black drop shadow — NO solid banner behind, NO black rectangle, ONLY outline and shadow; BOTTOM FIXED LINE "PLEASE LISTEN" in bold sans-serif font (40-50% the size of main text), horizontally centered, anchored to the very bottom edge of the frame with minimal margin, bright vivid lime-green (hex #7FFF00), thick black outline/stroke and dark drop shadow — NO banner behind. Layer order from back to front: IMAGE (scene + character) → VIGNETTE (dark edges/sides) → TEXT (white + red + green). Text hierarchy: WHITE (hook) → RED (impact) → GREEN (call-to-action). All text must be legible at mobile thumbnail size. Premium cinematic viral YouTube thumbnail style, divine feminine Chosen One spiritual awakening niche.
